provenance_note: Created 2026-04-30 as a staged graph plan for the Human Person and Formation Core Slice.
reason_for_inclusion: Plan relationship objects without promoting them before concept and claim review.

candidate_relationships.rationale: Trinitarian theology should later inform relationality/personhood, but this needs careful review before graph encoding.
Imago Dei supplies the primary shared-core anthropological dignity anchor.
Personhood should become a reusable concept within anthropology rather than remain only in application prose.
Ordered love governs which goods outrank efficiency and scale.
AI systems should be assessed by what they form in persons and institutions.
Fallenness requires auditability, role clarity, and anti-drift controls.
Grace prevents technical improvement from being framed as moral redemption.

review_gate_before_promotion: confirm concept nodes exist and are not duplicate
confirm claim objects exist or are explicitly staged
confirm source basis and review status
